title: Michael Atiyeh

'''Michael Atiyeh''' is a colorist who has colored many ''[[Star Wars]]'' comics over the years, for both [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse]] and [[Marvel Comics]]. He was one of many artists and writers acquired by Dark Horse after [[Wikipedia:CrossGen Comics|CrossGen Comics]] went bankrupt.

Atiyeh has also worked for [[Wikipedia:DC Comics|DC]], [[Wikipedia:Image Comics|Image]], and [[Wikipedia:Wizard Entertainment|Wizard Entertainment]]. He fell in love with comic books at the age of six, after seeing an issue of [[Wikipedia:Spider-Man|Spider-Man]] in [[Wikipedia:Syracuse, New York|Syracuse, New York]].<ref name="Image bio">{{WebCite|url=https://imagecomics.com/creators/michael-atiyeh|text=Michael Atiyeh|work=[[Wikipedia:Image Comics|Image Comics]]|archivedate=20251016101211}}</ref>
